LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.description: A network of reinforced tubes that once regulated high-density ether coolant, allowing the cryptoforge to function at peak efficiency. The technology behind it is now lost.
LanguageData.VQE_AetherPressureTubes.label: aether pressure tubes
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.description: An uralt workbench designed for crafting advanced crypto-technology weapons and armor. It features intricate mechanisms and a forging process that seems to defy conventional metallurgy. The tools and technology integrated into it are beyond modern understanding, utilizing encrypted blueprints and precision-tuned nano-assembly techniques.
LanguageData.VQE_AncientCryptoforge.label: uralt cryptoforge
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.description: These coils once channeled encrypted energy pulses to refine and enhance crypto-tech materials. Without a working power source, they are just intricate, useless relics.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoInfusionCoils.label: crypto infusion coils
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.description: A specialized workbench used to design and iterate new crypto-tech blueprints. The trial and error carefully documented in the blueprints and prototypes is bound to speed up the work done on the cryptoforge greatly.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptotechPrototypeBench.label: cryptotech prototype bench
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.description: A massive forging hammer designed to shape materials at near absolute zero, strengthening them beyond conventional limits. Now, it’s little more than an oversized chunk of frozen scrap.
LanguageData.VQE_SubZeroHammer.label: sub-zero hammer
